text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. In the first scene, I observe a classroom through glass walls, students absorbed in attentive learning—this atmosphere invites reflection on the nature of shared knowledge and the formal structures of education. In the second image, surrounded by colorful, striking displays about research and development, I am invigorated, inspired by the celebration of human innovation and the endless quest for new understanding. Being here, moving from quiet observation to the vibrant public exploration of ideas, I sense the dynamic interplay between contemplation and creation.
